title: Luffy Laughs at Pica's Voice
description: Pages 6–10 focus on luffy laughs at pica's voice, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as pica's giant stone body reshapes Dressrosa, scattering the fighters and forcing Luffy's group to race toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well...no matter. I am quite busy myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As repay- went for the debt I owe your crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have decided it is my duty to take DoFlamin- Go's head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So you can go hide somewhere safe, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't bother, I'm going to do that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have to repay Rebecca- CA for buying me lunch!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ?! was your whole battle based on food?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do not test my patience!! I can see right through your scheme!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You mean to take the glory of killing Doflamingo and boost your own popularity still further!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Popularity?!! What're you on about?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Isn't it obvious?! No newspaper could resist the man who defeated a pirate as terrible as Dofla- Mingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They'll be begging to cover me for days in a row....!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: "Hello there, superstar", they'll say!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "How do you feel about pirate affairs lately...wait, huh?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "Caven- dish-san?! Hello?! You are there, aren't you?!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: "I'm right here." "Alas, I cannot see your face through this blinding light!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: "I must Apollo- Gise, my dear. I cannot hide my own radiance!" Ahahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There you are, straw hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Oh, no!! Run for it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Wait right there, grandson of GARP!! Eheheh!! Worry not, I no longer hold any grudge against your family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Happou Armada (GANG) Don ChinjaO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Leader: Sal

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The whole reason we came to this country was to lay waste to Doflamingo's twisted business!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Vice-leader: Boo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Such a meagre bounty isn't enough to buy us out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You've found yourself all kinds of new awkward friends...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The colosseum was just full of weirdos!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now then, I have decided I must repay my debt to God usopp...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: ...by putting paid to Dofla- Mingo once and for all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Seriously, don't bother!! I'm going to do that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: What did you say?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy....!!! Let us forget our differences in the arena!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Warrier of Elbaf Rajrudin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: On my honour as a warrior of Elbaf, I will repay my debt by eliminating Doflamingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: My kingdom of produce has long been indebted to King Riku as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: King of Produce Elizabetho II & Military Advisor Dagama

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I will be the one to sink Doflamingo beneath the waves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Y...you heard his majesty!! We will not be swayed by Bounties!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: No, we're the ones who'll take his head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: How could we forget the heavenly light that shone down upon our God?!!! Let us show our repentance!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGO'S HEAD?! I WILL TAKE IT MYSELF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Fleet Commodore orlumbus

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: destruction is my repay-ment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Cannon- Blaster IdEO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Execution is my SPE- Clality!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Beheader Suleiman

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: No, I will!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: longleg blue gilly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Then how about the lot of you come along and back us up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Preposter- Ous!!! I will take Dofla- Mingo's head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: these guys are hopeless... they're 0 all too stubborn.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Hey, you lot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Give it a rest already, all of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: I already said, I'm going to beat up Doflamingo myself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear what I said?! I will repay my debt!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: If you don't quiet down, I'll snap your neck, you insolent Saviour!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Popula- Rity....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: For justice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Honour!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Our God!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: There they are!! The three-star and two-star "Convicts"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Take their heads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Hey...aren't those the former toys who were down underground with us......?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Do they have no shame....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: Die, filthy ingrates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: AAAGH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: Hmm? You're ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: MOO?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: Ucy!! It's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #67
dialogue.text: Mooo- Oooo!!

summary: Luffy Laughs at Pica's Voice develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
